apps.name: Google Play Store
apps.prompt:
Convert the attached image into a premium disco-themed 3D app icon. Treat the attached image purely as the shape-and-color source.
Preserve the exact shape, silhouette, and colors shown in the attached image — the colors must remain the dominant palette and the result must stay visually identical in form and color. Apply the disco treatment as reflective glossy 3D material, polished chrome edges, subtle sparkles, soft holographic accents and dynamic lighting that ENHANCE the existing colors — do NOT recolor, hue-shift, neon-wash, or replace them with a rainbow. Clean premium look, not a literal disco ball.
SHAPE FIDELITY (strict): reproduce ONLY the shapes present in the attached image. Do NOT add, invent, or extend extra corners, tails, notches, frames, borders, or background tiles. The outer silhouette must match the attached image exactly.
BACKGROUND (strict): place the icon on a SOLID, FLAT, PURE WHITE (#FFFFFF) background that completely fills the frame. Do NOT draw a transparency checkerboard, checkered grid, squares, or ANY pattern. Do NOT make the background transparent. The background must be uniform opaque white with nothing else on it.
NO SHADOWS (strict): absolutely NO drop shadow, cast shadow, ground shadow, contact shadow, reflection puddle, or dark gradient beneath or around the icon. Depth lives ONLY on the object itself.
COMPOSITION (strict): the icon must be perfectly centered in a square 1:1 frame with equal margins, upright and front-facing, no rotation or tilt, filling about 80% of the frame, fully visible, never cropped. A single, self-contained, balanced object.
Strong depth, modern launcher icon aesthetic, optimized for Android.
